scrape.title: Menus — Mister S
scrape.menuText: 0 Our current all day a la carte menu is below. There is a minimum order of 2 courses per person, including a main, after 4pm.For Friday lunch we have specials, this week they are;Wagyu Flank Steak, Chips or Salad, Béarnaise or Chimichurri €21Grilled Prawns, Chips or Salad, Smoked Tomato Butter €21CURRENT MENUFOODSTARTERSBurnt End Rendang Spring Rolls €12.5Grilled Prawns, Smoked Tomato, Chilli & Garlic Butter €15Seabass Crudo, Cucumber Aguachile €13Beef Tartare, Crispy Potato Terrine €14Nectarines, Stracciatella, Hazelnuts €13MAINSAll mains are cooked over charcoal and woodSmoked Beef Shortrib, Chimichurri €23 Piri Piri Chicken,
